decisions.title_en: Moonshot AI releases Kimi K3, largest open-weight model ever at 2.8T params
decisions.reason: story_key not in lookback. New flagship: 2.8T-param open MoE, tops Frontend Code Arena, #3 on GDPval-AA v2 ahead of Claude Opus 4.8, weights promised by July 27.

decisions.title_en: TSMC posts record Q2 profit +77%, raises 2026 capex to $60-64B on AI demand
decisions.reason: story_key not in lookback. Q2 net profit $22.4B (+77% YoY), revenue $40.2B, capex raised from $52-56B to $60-64B, extra $100B for Arizona.

decisions.title_en: Mira Murati's Thinking Machines ships first open-weight model Inkling
decisions.reason: story_key not in lookback. 975B-param MoE (41B active), Apache 2.0, full weights on Hugging Face, live for fine-tuning on Tinker; bet on customizable over one-size-fits-all.

decisions.title_en: Fireworks AI raises $1.5B Series D at $17.5B valuation
decisions.reason: story_key not in lookback. $1.505B led by Atreides/Index/TCV, Nvidia participating; crossed $1B ARR (5x growth), 40T+ tokens/day.

decisions.title_en: First Nvidia H200 shipments reach China as Beijing approves imports for 10 firms
decisions.reason: story_key not in lookback. US confirms first official H200 shipments to China; ~10 firms (Alibaba, Tencent, ByteDance, JD, DeepSeek) cleared, up to 75k chips each, but volumes still 'trivial'.

decisions.title_en: Google renames NotebookLM to Gemini Notebook, adds cloud code execution
decisions.reason: story_key not in lookback. Rebrand at 30M users/600k orgs; ships a secure cloud computer that writes and runs code against uploaded sources, live for AI Ultra users.

decisions.title_en: Boston Dynamics integrates Gemini Robotics-ER 1.6 into Spot
decisions.reason: story_key not in lookback. Partnership with Google Cloud/DeepMind puts Gemini Robotics-ER 1.6 into Spot and Orbit for spatial reasoning and autonomous decisions in industrial settings.

decisions.title_en: Unitree wins STAR Market IPO approval, seeks ~$619M
decisions.reason: story_key not in lookback. Shanghai STAR Market IPO approval, ~$619M raise for better AI models and new robots; first humanoid maker forced to publish real cost/reliability numbers.

decisions.title_en: Unitree unveils $650k transforming wall-smashing mecha GD01
decisions.reason: story_key not in lookback. $650k transforming mecha statement piece, same week as its IPO approval; signals move up-market from cheap dogs/humanoids.

decisions.title_en: AI-security M&A tripled in H1 2026 as cybersecurity dealmaking surges
decisions.reason: story_key not in lookback. 219 cybersecurity acquisitions in H1 2026, AI-specific security deals tripled to 29 — consolidation wave as agentic threats rise.
Already published 2026-07-17 with full launch coverage (2M context, Deep Think). No substantively new development for 07-18.

decisions.title_en: Xi Jinping WAIC keynote and WAICO
decisions.reason: Already published 2026-07-17. No new development beyond the keynote already covered.
Already published 2026-07-17 with full spec coverage. No new information.

decisions.title_en: AI lab chiefs converge on frontier regulation
decisions.reason: Already published 2026-07-16. White House voluntary-standards talks are a continuation; no concrete new announcement yet (expected 'next week').

decisions.title_en: Emergent becomes unicorn with $130M Series C
OpenAI discontinues Atlas browser, folds into ChatGPT super-app
decisions.reason: Announcement dated 2026-07-09, 9 days old (>5 day limit).
The $30B milestone dates to April 2026 (run-rate already $47B by late May). Recirculated in July recaps but underlying event is stale (>5 days).

decisions.title_en: DeepSeek V4 stable release targeted for July 24
decisions.reason: V4 Pro shipped 2026-04-24 (stale); the 'stable' release is a scheduled July 24 event that has not happened yet. No concrete new development within the window.
